query: SELECT m.matchedItemName, COUNT(*) as match_count, ROUND(AVG(m.unitPrice), 4) as avg_price FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND m.inventoryItemId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.matchedItemName ORDER BY match_count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT m.matchedItemName, COUNT(*) as match_count, ROUND(AVG(m.unitPrice), 4) as avg_price FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m WHERE m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND m.inventoryItemId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.matchedItemName ORDER BY match_count DESC;
